title: Increased Chat Height
description: A simple mod to increase the maximum chat height.
body:
## Overview

Tired of your Minecraft chat window being too small?  
This **client-side mod** increases the maximum (focused and unfocused) **chat height** up to **4x larger** than vanilla! **(Also increases chat scale 5x times)**

Perfect for players on active servers or anyone who needs to follow long conversations, commands, or logs more easily.

---

## Screenshot

![Expanded Chat Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UqPX8SRT/images/38a8026fcc8f21859fe8230ecb18241cf8d7a62d.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a7d6a257d642a44c086d204a7c3d02fc93e3f32.png)
---

## Requirements

- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

---

## Have an issue?

I created this mod mostly for my own needs, but if you run into a bug or have a feature request, feel free to contact me on **Discord**: [https://discord.gg/FaxbR9eEFW](https://discord.gg/FaxbR9eEFW).  
I'll do my best to help you out!
